meta.title: Hybrid TDVP Rotation-Gate Benchmark Report
meta.description: Hybrid MPS circuit simulation with rotation-only probes (RX/RY/RZ/RXX/RYY/RZZ) vs Qiskit Statevector

settings.observable_panel: Pauli X, Y, Z on each qubit
settings.simulator_auto_pad: product states padded to chi >= 2 before gates
settings.gate_family: Only continuous Pauli rotations; Ry(π/4) + RZZ(θ) replace H + CX layouts from the CNOT suite
notes: padding study uses direct MPS path (no simulator auto-pad); pad=None is chi=1
